flags.what: On phones the top navigation hides both section links and leaves only the theme toggle, so mobile users lose wayfinding to 'How it works' and 'Your shelf'.
flags.fix: Keep at least one in-flow navigation affordance on mobile — a compact menu or an inline link — instead of dropping both anchors.

recommendation: A strong, on-brand, calm reading-tracker hero that clears the bar on clarity, hierarchy, accessibility, and consistency, with all five states of the 'currently reading' list actually designed. Safe to ship at /marginalia/ as delivered. Optional polish: keep a navigation affordance on mobile (the top nav currently collapses to just the theme toggle), and give the muted text and error-on-tint pairings a little more contrast headroom above the AA floor when the palette is next tuned. Neither is a blocker.
assessed: Read .preview/current/index.html, its design-system.md, the inherited Tessera brand library at docs/design/brand/, and a real full-page render (.preview/snapshot.png). Critical light- and dark-mode contrast pairs spot-checked numerically.
